queries.question: Show me the characters that every screenplay has.
queries.sql: SELECT Characters.roleType  from Screenplays_Characters join Characters on Screenplays_Characters.characterID = Characters.characterID join Screenplays on Screenplays_Characters.screenplayID = Screenplays.screenplayID   GROUP BY Screenplays_Characters.characterID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Screenplays_Characters.screenplayID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Screenplays)

queries.question: Show me the characters that every screenplay has.
queries.sql: select screenplays.title , characters.roletype from Screenplays_Characters join Characters on Screenplays_Characters.characterID = Characters.characterID join Screenplays on Screenplays_Characters.screenplayID = Screenplays.screenplayID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?roletype WHERE {
  ?screenplays_characters a :Screenplays_Characters .
  ?characters a :Character .
  ?screenplays_characters p:hasCharacters ?characters .
  ?screenplays a :Screenplay .
  ?screenplays_characters p:hasScreenplays ?screenplays .
  ?screenplays p:title ?title .
  ?characters p:roleType ?roletype .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the characters that every screenplay has.
